title: Hypertension
description: Hypertension, or high blood pressure, is a chronic medical condition in which the blood pressure in the arteries is persistently elevated.

title: Hypertension Risk
description: Untreated hypertension increases the risk of heart disease, stroke, and kidney damage.

title: Antibiotics and Viruses
description: Antibiotics are not effective against viral infections such as the common cold or influenza.

title: Vaccines
description: Vaccines greatly reduce the risk of many infectious diseases but do not guarantee complete protection for every individual.

title: Lifestyle and Heart Health
description: Regular exercise, a balanced diet, and avoiding smoking can reduce the risk of heart disease but cannot completely eliminate it.
